productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adi Fiero M White Sports Shoes
description: Take running to the next level with these Adi Fiero M shoes from adidas. These comfortable trainers are engineered to provide maximum performance in a light-weight structure. Team it up with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperMesh uppers with synthetic overlays for better breathability and structureLace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes symbolizing the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sidesPadded collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and on the heelMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortPhylon midsole for lightweight structureOutsoleadiPRENE®+ delivers supreme forefoot cushioningadiPRENE® offers under heel impact protectionadiWEAR® outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasScooped out heel gives better cushioning of  the heel from shockImpact guidance system enables better motion of the feetFlex grooves provide better flexibity to the feetWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
